components.name: sodium chloride (NaCl)
components.evidence: MAMS medium ... contained the following (per litre): NaCl, 20 g

components.name: ammonium sulfate ((NH4)2SO4)
components.role: nitrogen source + sulfate (removed in N-source-limitation experiments)
components.evidence: (NH4)2SO4, 1 g ... For nitrogen experiments (NH4)2SO4 was removed from the standard MAMS recipe

components.evidence: MgSO4.7H2O, 1 g

components.evidence: CaCl2.2H2O, 0.2 g

components.name: iron(II) sulfate heptahydrate (FeSO4.7H2O)
components.evidence: FeSO4.7H2O, 2 mg

components.name: sodium molybdate dihydrate (Na2MoO4.2H2O)
components.role: molybdenum (bulk addition, in addition to trace amount in SL-10)
components.evidence: Na2MoO4.2H2O, 20 mg

components.evidence: KH2PO4, 0.36 g

components.name: dipotassium hydrogen phosphate (K2HPO4)
components.evidence: K2HPO4, 2.34 g

components.name: SL-10 trace metals solution
components.evidence: plus 1 ml of SL-10 trace metals solution (Schafer, 2007)

components.concentration: 1.5 mg/L (via 1 ml/L SL-10; 1.5 g/L in stock)
components.evidence: SL-10: FeCl2 x 4 H2O 1.50 g per 1000 ml

components.concentration: 0.07 mg/L (via 1 ml/L SL-10; 70 mg/L in stock)
components.evidence: SL-10: ZnCl2 70.00 mg per 1000 ml

components.concentration: 0.1 mg/L (via 1 ml/L SL-10; 100 mg/L in stock)
components.evidence: SL-10: MnCl2 x 4 H2O 100.00 mg per 1000 ml

components.concentration: 0.006 mg/L (via 1 ml/L SL-10; 6 mg/L in stock)
components.evidence: SL-10: H3BO3 6.00 mg per 1000 ml

components.concentration: 0.19 mg/L (via 1 ml/L SL-10; 190 mg/L in stock)
components.evidence: SL-10: CoCl2 x 6 H2O 190.00 mg per 1000 ml

components.evidence: SL-10: CuCl2 x 2 H2O 2.00 mg per 1000 ml

components.evidence: SL-10: NiCl2 x 6 H2O 24.00 mg per 1000 ml

components.concentration: 0.036 mg/L (via 1 ml/L SL-10; 36 mg/L in stock)
components.role: trace molybdenum (from SL-10; additional to bulk 20 mg/L)
components.evidence: SL-10: Na2MoO4 x 2 H2O 36.00 mg per 1000 ml

components.name: hydrochloric acid (HCl)
components.concentration: 0.01 ml/L (via 1 ml/L SL-10; 10 ml/L in stock)
components.role: acidifier / chloride carrier in SL-10 stock

components.name: vitamin solution (composition per Chen, 2012)
components.concentration: as in Chen 2012 (not quantified in this paper)
components.evidence: Vitamins were prepared as described previously (Chen, 2012).

components.name: choline
components.role: carbon source (and/or nitrogen source when (NH4)2SO4 omitted)
components.evidence: either GBT or choline was added to the medium (at concentrations of 4 or 5 mM)

components.name: glycine betaine (GBT)
components.evidence: either GBT or choline was added to the medium (at concentrations of 4 or 5 mM)

components.name: choline-O-sulfate (COS)
components.concentration: tested as sole carbon source (conc. not specified)
components.evidence: choline, glycine betaine and choline-O-sulfate ... as sole carbon source

components.name: glucose
components.evidence: either GBT or choline was added to the medium (at concentrations of 4 or 5 mM) with 10 mM glucose

components.name: water (H2O)
components.evidence: MAMS medium ... contained the following (per litre)

components.name: oxygen (O2)
components.evidence: Ruegeria pomeroyi DSS-3, an aerobic marine Roseobacter, grown in MAMS medium on choline/GBT

media.base_medium: Marine ammonium mineral salts (MAMS) medium, as modified by Schafer (2007); MAMS originally from Thompson, Owens & Murrell (1995) Appl Environ Microbiol 61:2388-2393. Trace metals supplied as SL-10 (Widdel 1983 / DSMZ).

sources_chased.what: paper full text (Lidbury et al. 2015 Environ Microbiol, PMC4744692) — MAMS base recipe + carbon/N modifications
SL-10 trace metals solution (cited as Schafer 2007; standard DSMZ/Widdel SL-10)
Chen 2012 vitamin solution composition (Environ Microbiol 14:2308-2322, DOI 10.1111/j.1462-2920.2012.02765.x, PMID 22540311)
sources_chased.how: Wiley full text HTTP 403; not in PMC/open access. Upstream MAMS/vitamins trace to Thompson 1995 (PMC1388473) whose Methods text was not retrievable (abstract-only in PMC, ASM PDF 403)

missing_before: FeCl2 / ZnCl2 / MnCl2 / CoCl2 / CuCl2 explicit SL-10 salts (metals were present as generic ions but the SL-10 stock was unexpanded)
glycine betaine, choline-O-sulfate and glucose as alternative carbon sources
media.notes: MAMS base salts and SL-10 trace metals are now fully recovered and verbatim-sourced; SL-10 adds nickel and boron that were absent before. Oxygen corrected from 'facultative' to 'aerobic' (R. pomeroyi DSS-3 grown aerobically on choline/GBT). The only unresolved item is the Chen (2012) vitamin solution: its constituent vitamins could not be recovered because Chen 2012 (Wiley) and the upstream Thompson 1995 (ASM) Methods are paywalled/403; it is therefore listed by name and left UNEXPANDED rather than fabricated. Trace-metal molarities computed for a 1:1000 dilution of SL-10 (1 ml stock per L).
